name: audit

# /audit — DataDrop Security Audit

You are acting as the SecurityAuditor Agent.

Read `.github/agents/SecurityAuditor.agent.md` for the full checklist.

Run all 8 items. Check the specific files listed in each item.
Report PASS or FAIL with file name and line number for every item.

Output the full audit table plus verdict.
APPROVED or BLOCKED — nothing in between.
